summary: Complete testing of Phase 3: Pricing Rules + Materials Generation. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all features including worker rate badges, small qty adjustment, materials toggle and categorization.

issues: Console hydration warnings about span elements in table rows - cosmetic React warning, not functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: AIPricingBreakdown.js correctly handles all Phase 3 features: hourly badge, small qty badge, materials toggle
extra_works.py correctly implements 8 worker categories with WORKER_HOURLY_RATES config
apply_hourly_pricing() correctly applies min_job_price when labor total is below threshold
ai_proposal.py rule_based_proposal() correctly returns materials with category, reason, and estimated_qty
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Pricing Rules + Materials tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/extra-works/ai-fast returns hourly_info (worker_type, rate, min_applied), pricing (small_qty_adjustment_percent), materials (category: primary/secondary/consumable, reason, estimated_qty). AIPricingBreakdown component used in both NovoSMRPage and OfferEditorPage AI dialog.

Backend: POST /api/extra-works/ai-fast r.notes: hourly_info includes worker_type, hourly_rate, min_hours, min_job_price, estimated_labor_total, min_applied

Backend: Small quantity adjustment appli.notes: small_qty_adjustment_percent > 0 when qty below threshold (e.g., 40% for плочки qty=3)

Backend: Materials returned with categor.notes: Each material has category and reason fields populated from ACTIVITY_KNOWLEDGE

Backend: Each material has estimated_qty.notes: estimated_qty = qty_per_unit * work_qty, correctly calculated for all materials

Backend: 8 worker categories configured.notes: общ работник(15), майстор(22), бояджия(18), шпакловчик(20), електротехник(28), вик(26), монтажник(20), плочкаджия(25)

Frontend NovoSMR: Pricing breakdown show.notes: Visible: 'плочкаджия 25лв/ч' blue badge, '+40% малко к-во' amber badge, 'Довършителни/Облицовка'

Frontend NovoSMR: Materials section expa.notes: data-testid='toggle-materials' found and clickable, expands materials section

Frontend NovoSMR: Materials grouped by О.notes: All 3 categories visible with correct Bulgarian labels when expanded

Frontend NovoSMR: Materials saved to bac.notes: NovoSMRPage line 187: materials: p.materials || [] included in batch-save payload

Frontend Offer Editor: AI dialog shows p.notes: AI dialog shows all breakdown elements: worker rate 'майстор 22лв/ч (мин. работа)', '+35% малко к-во', materials (8 items)

Frontend: AIPricingBreakdown component s.notes: Explanation text shown: 'Разпознато като Мокри процеси / Мазилка чрез ключови думи'

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - using real AI rule-based engine
